selected_important_turn.text: Ha I get that! I'll need that too, but mostly water because my family wants to do a lot of hikes.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn discloses your top priority (water) and acknowledges the opponent's preference, creating the core integrative possibility that enables mutually beneficial trades.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: While it shares your high-level priority, it misses a chance to be more actionable: no quantities, no clear ranking beyond 'mostly water', no sign of flexibility or specific trade proposals. That leaves room for ambiguity and a missed opportunity to structure an explicit integrative offer earlier.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Be a bit more specific and strategic when revealing needs: quantify your water need (or state willingness to trade off specific items), signal any flexibility on lower-value items (e.g., firewood), or immediately suggest a simple trade that protects their high priority (food) while securing needed water.

value2reason.Medium: I will be hungry after hiking!
value2reason.High: I plan to do a lot of hiking on difficult terrain.

value2reason.Low: Water is essential to our life.
value2reason.Medium: Need firewood to keep me warm during the night.
value2reason.High: I am a big eater. I tend to eat a lot throughout the day. Need more food.

dialogue.text: Hi buddy. How you doing today? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Great! I'm so excited to go camping this weekend!🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Me too!! Though it's over 100 degrees these days. 😡
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Well hopefully it will be cooler up in the mountains. What supplies are you in need of?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am a big eater. I tend to eat a lot throughout the day. You? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Ha I get that! I'll need that too, but mostly water because my family wants to do a lot of hikes.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need most of the water since I’ll be hiking a lot. I’m flexible on firewood but want at least 2 water packages. How about you take 2 water and 1 food, and I’ll take the rest?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m okay with 2 water and 1 food, but I need more firewood for warmth. Let’s split the remaining 3 firewood and 2 food packages evenly. That way, I get 2 food and 2 firewood, and you get 1 food and 2 firewood. Sounds fair?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’m okay with 2 water and 1 food, but I need more firewood for warmth. Let’s split the remaining 3 firewood and 2 food packages evenly. That way, I get 2 food and 2 firewood, and you get 1 food and 2 firewood. Sounds fair?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for warmth, so I’ll take 2 firewood and 1 food. You can have the remaining 1 firewood and 2 food. Let’s confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’m okay with 2 water and 1 food, but I need more firewood for warmth. Let’s split the remaining 3 firewood and 2 food packages evenly. That way, I get 2 food and 2 firewood, and you get 1 food and 2 firewood. Sounds fair?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’ll take 2 food and 2 firewood. You can have 1 food and 1 firewood. Let’s confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’ll take 2 water, 2 food, and 2 firewood. You can have 1 water, 1 food, and 1 firewood. That way, I get my needed water, and we both have enough for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for warmth. Let’s agree on 2 firewood and 2 food for me, and 1 firewood and 1 food for you. That way, I get my priority items and we’re both covered.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’ll take 2 water, 2 food, and 1 firewood. You can have 1 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood. This way, I secure my needed water, and you get more firewood for warmth. Let’s confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for warmth. Let’s finalize: I take 2 firewood and 2 food, and you take 1 firewood and 1 food. That way, I get my priority items, and we’re both covered.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
